case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. FRANCISCO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEBORAH HARVEGO REGARDING ARBITRATION PROCESS FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC
